payload.content:
{"body":"# Chore: Remove AdminBarWrapper from frontend layout

| | |
|---|---|
| **Category** | Chore |
| **Scope** | Full-stack |
| **Priority** | 🟡 P2 — Medium |

## Summary
Remove the Payload CMS AdminBar from the frontend layout — it renders in the DOM on the login page even when hidden via CSS, so the cleanest fix is to remove it entirely.

## What Needs to Change
Remove the `<AdminBarWrapper />` JSX block and its import from `src/app/(frontend)/layout.tsx`:
- Delete line 11: `import { AdminBarWrapper } from '@/ui/web/AdminBar/AdminBarWrapper'`
- Delete lines 106–110: the `<AdminBarWrapper adminBarProps={{ preview: isEnabled }} />` block

## Affected Area
src/app/(frontend)/layout.tsx

## Acceptance Criteria
- `AdminBarWrapper` import removed
- `<AdminBarWrapper />` JSX removed
- Login page at /login renders without the hidden admin bar element in the DOM

## Additional Context
**Research notes:**
- `src/app/(frontend)/layout.tsx:11` — `import { AdminBarWrapper }` (the import to remove)
- `src/app/(frontend)/layout.tsx:106-110` — `<AdminBarWrapper adminBarProps={{ preview: isEnabled }} />` (the JSX to remove)
- The element `<div.py-2.bg-foreground.text-background.sm:block.hidden>` seen on the login page is the AdminBar — it renders even when `isEnabled = false`, hidden via CSS `hidden` class on the outer `div`, but still present in the DOM.

","title":"Remove AdminBarWrapper from frontend layout"}
